source: Exhibit B — Franchise Agreement (and related agreements)
extraction_method: Item 17 summary tables + body cross-references + targeted reads

clauses.obligation: License to operate at CFA-designated location(s) only
clauses.duration: Terminates Dec 31 of year signed; auto-renews 1 year
clauses.trigger: 30 days notice by either party for non-renewal
clauses.exceptions: CFA can change terms with 45 days notice

clauses.obligation: $10,000 initial franchise fee; $5,000 for additional business
Pay Base Operating Service Fee + Additional Operating Service Fee monthly
clauses.money_formula: Base = 15% of GR minus equipment rental minus $300 business services fee. Additional = 50% of Net Profit.
clauses.exceptions: Operator retains Base Profit ($1,000/mo) + Extra Profit ($1,500/mo) even if insufficient revenue

clauses.obligation: Pay monthly rent per Lease terms
Pay monthly equipment rental
clauses.exceptions: May be less for captive venue if owner provides equipment

clauses.obligation: May be required to contribute 0%–3.25% of GR; must participate in mandatory promotions
clauses.trigger: Currently 0%; CFA can reinstate at any time
clauses.exceptions: Local/regional by majority vote; CFA administers; not audited

clauses.obligation: Complete initial 5-week training; participate in ongoing seminars if required
clauses.trigger: Pre-opening mandatory; ongoing at CFA discretion
clauses.money_formula: CFA pays training cost; Operator not compensated

clauses.obligation: Full compliance with all CFA minimum standards, guidelines, specifications, manuals
Purchase all items from CFA-approved suppliers only; stop buying from disapproved suppliers
clauses.exceptions: CFA can change approved suppliers at any time

clauses.obligation: Participate in The Chicken Coop Insurance Company program for WC, GL, auto, EPLI
clauses.exceptions: ND, OH, WA, WY require state WC fund

clauses.obligation: Deposit Daily Deposit into cash handling system; transmit daily report to CFA
clauses.exceptions: CFA acts as agent for collecting/accounting receipts

clauses.obligation: CFA can terminate without cause on 30 days notice; or immediately + payment; or immediately in first 90 days
clauses.money_formula: Payment = greater of $1,000 or formula amount

clauses.obligation: CFA can terminate for listed defaults
clauses.trigger: Default events including public scandal, breach, failure to pay, fraud, bankruptcy, opening on Sunday/Christmas, force majeure

clauses.obligation: FA terminates automatically on death or permanent disability
clauses.trigger: Death or permanent disability of Operator/Operator-Owner
clauses.money_formula: Working capital deposit refunded to estate

clauses.obligation: No third-party transfers; only entity transfer for convenience with 100% ownership + personal guarantee
No fast food/QSR ownership, management, consulting, or supervisory employment within 5 miles of any CFA restaurant
Same as during-term but 5 miles from Operator's former locations only
clauses.exceptions: Subject to state addenda (may be unenforceable in CA, ND)

clauses.obligation: Never disclose trade secrets (perpetual under GA law); other confidential info protected for 2 years post-term
Vacate premises, return equipment, pay all sums, cease trademark/patent use, return manuals, terminate banking/delivery
Reimburse CFA for claims arising from restaurant operations
Litigation in Atlanta, GA; Georgia law; jury waiver; class waiver; punitive damages waiver
Double base + percentage rent as liquidated damages if Operator remains after termination
Must not open on Sunday or Christmas Day; violation is terminable default
If FA assigned to entity, Operator-Owner must personally guarantee all obligations

distinctive_clauses: CFA owns/leases ALL premises and equipment — operator has zero equity in physical assets
Franchise term is less than 1 year with annual auto-renewal — no long-term commitment from CFA
Zero transfers possible — franchise has no resale value
Auto-termination on death/disability — no succession planning
Sunday and Christmas Day closure is a terminable offense
CFA can terminate without cause in first 90 days with no payment
During-term noncompete effectively nationwide due to system size (2,600+ restaurants)
CFA acts as Operator's agent for cash handling — collects and distributes all revenue
Operator's guaranteed draws: $1,000/mo Base Profit + $1,500/mo Extra Profit advance
